subcodes.title: Words to Mary MacNutt et al in 1904
subcodes.first_line: This is indeed a blessed meeting, for the East and the West are joined here in love and harmony. This was the will of the Blessed Perfection.
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @spiritual transformation, @station of the Manifestation of God, @East and West; communication between East and West
